<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band02_chunk010.pdf#page=15 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band02 p478 -->

FISCHBACHAU

<!-- header: FISCHBACHAU -->


[[File:Band02_chunk010_p015_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band02_chunk010_p015_img002.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band02_chunk010_p015_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band02_chunk010_p015_img004.jpg|thumb]]


gelitten, als mit den Wundmalen des Kreuzes« (Sulpicius Severus, Vita 24, loc. cit., S. 49 f.).


[[File:Band02_chunk010_p015_img005.jpg|thumb|C Martin verteilt Almosen]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band02 p479 -->
